trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizil

trending_videos.title: Buffalo Sabres at Boston Bruins
trending_videos.description: Boston and Buffalo continue their best-of-seven series in Game 6 at TD Garden. Boston won Game 5, while Buffalo leads the series 3-2. Jeremy Swayman made 26 saves, including a key pad stop. David Pastrnak scored to stave off the Bruins' elimination.

trending_videos.title: Fox & Friends Weekend
trending_videos.description: FOX & Friends Weekend, hosted by Rachel Campos-Duffy and Charlie Hurt, highlights the latest in news, entertainment, politics, and sports.

trending_videos.title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil - Trailer Reaction
trending_videos.description: My reaction to the first teaser for Zach Creagger's Resident Evil. Let's hope it's good!

trending_videos.title: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
trending_videos.description: The Lightning and the Canadiens continue their series in Game 6 at Bell Centre. Montreal leads 3-2 after a Game 5 win. Brendan Gallagher opened the scoring for Montreal while rookie Jakub Dobes stopped 38 of 40 shots in the 3-2 Game 5 victory.

trending_videos.title: Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
The definitive documentary on beloved comedian Martin Short, using beautiful, intimate, never-before-seen archive.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82128115

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft.

trending_videos.title: Cadillac Championship, Second Round
trending_videos.description: The second round of the PGA Tour signature event continues at Trump National Doral in Miami. The field enjoys a no-cut format, meaning all competitors play the weekend and remain in contention for the staggering $3.6 million first-place check.

movie_trailers.description: Trailers and reactions to movie trailers are popular among trending videos.
examples: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil - Trailer Reaction
Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
movie_trailers.insights: Movie trailers and their reactions generate significant interest, particularly when tied to popular franchises like Resident Evil.

sports_content.description: Live sports events and highlights maintain consistent viewer engagement.
examples: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
sports_content.insights: Sports content, especially live events and highlights, attracts a dedicated audience, suggesting opportunities for content creators to focus on real-time sports commentary and analyses.

news_and_opinion.description: News and opinion shows continue to feature prominently in trending topics.
news_and_opinion.insights: News channels can leverage trending news topics and opinion pieces to engage audiences, especially on weekends when viewers may have more leisure time to consume longer content.

unique_challenges.description: Unique and adventure-based content captures viewer attention.
examples: I Got Hunted by the World's Deadliest Assassin
unique_challenges.insights: Adventure and challenge-based videos have a strong appeal, suggesting content opportunities for creators to explore experiential or stunt-based content.

music_videos.description: Music videos remain a staple in trending content.
music_videos.insights: Music videos continue to attract views, indicating opportunities for musicians to release creative and visually captivating content to engage audiences.

diverse_channels.description: Trending content is produced by a range of different channels, from major studios to individual creators.
diverse_channels.insights: This diversity in content creators suggests that both well-established and emerging creators can achieve trending status by tapping into popular genres and topics.

cross-platform promotion.description: Channels associated with larger networks (e.g., ESPN, FOX News) appear frequently in trending lists.
cross-platform promotion.insights: Utilizing cross-platform promotion and leveraging network associations can enhance visibility and drive traffic to content.

genre_expansion.description: Expanding into genres with consistent viewer interest, such as sports, movies, and adventure content.
genre_expansion.strategy: Developing content that taps into popular franchises, live events, and experiential adventures can provide opportunities to capture a larger audience share.

reaction videos.description: Reaction videos to trailers and major announcements offer engagement opportunities.
reaction videos.strategy: Creators can produce timely reaction content to capitalize on the buzz surrounding major releases or announcements in entertainment and gaming.

integrated content strategies.description: Integrating various content types (e.g., news, sports, entertainment) can cater to diverse viewer interests.
integrated content strategies.strategy: Developing multi-faceted content strategies that include news analysis, sports commentaries, and entertainment reviews can attract varied audience segments.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
